LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THINK2BUILD, LLC & MICHAEL STRASSER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO CCP 473C(H) IS GRANTED. THE HEARING ON THIS MOTION IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 30, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M. PLAINTIFF HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT FACTS ESSENTIAL TO JUSTIFY THE OPPOSITION MAY EXIST BUT CANNOT, FOR THE REASONS STATED, BE PRESENTED. THE COURT ORDERS THE CONTINUANCE TO PERMIT AFFIDAVITS TO BE OBTAINED OR DISCOVERY TO BE HAD. OPPOSITION AND REPLY SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 437C(B). THE TRIAL DATE IS NOT CONTINUED BY THIS ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR7489.
